plain_space_ngakpa_robe.name: Plain Red-And-White Striped Ngakpa Robe
plain_space_ngakpa_robe.description: The red-and-white striped chuba of the ngakpa tradition — red for method, white for wisdom. Worn by tantric practitioners who have not taken monastic vows but have taken something harder. The garment is a reminder of what the wearer holds together.

plain_space_ngakpa_crown.name: Plain Space Ngakpa Crown
plain_space_ngakpa_crown.description: The ngakpa's unbound hair is wound and pinned with this ornament. Space practitioners wear it through long retreat and carry it out with them.

blessed_space_ngakpa_robe.name: Blessed Red-And-White Striped Ngakpa Robe
blessed_space_ngakpa_robe.description: The red-and-white striped chuba of the ngakpa tradition — red for method, white for wisdom. Worn by tantric practitioners who have not taken monastic vows but have taken something harder. The garment is a reminder of what the wearer holds together.

blessed_space_ngakpa_crown.name: Blessed Space Ngakpa Crown

legendary_space_ngakpa_crown.name: Legendary Space Ngakpa Crown
legendary_space_ngakpa_crown.description: The ngakpa's unbound hair is wound and pinned with this ornament. Space practitioners wear it through long retreat and carry it out with them.

plain_air_ngakpa_robe.name: Plain Green Ngakpa Robe
plain_air_ngakpa_robe.description: Green cotton, close-woven and lightweight. Air practitioners favor fewer layers and more movement. The color is said to invite the wind's attention.

plain_air_ngakpa_crown.name: Plain Air Ngakpa Crown
plain_air_ngakpa_crown.description: A light ornament of pale metal, worn low on the brow. Air practitioners note that it never seems to sit quite the same way twice.

blessed_air_ngakpa_robe.name: Blessed Green Ngakpa Robe
blessed_air_ngakpa_robe.description: Green cotton, close-woven and lightweight. Air practitioners favor fewer layers and more movement. The color is said to invite the wind's attention.

blessed_air_ngakpa_crown.name: Blessed Air Ngakpa Crown
blessed_air_ngakpa_crown.description: A light ornament of pale metal, worn low on the brow. Air practitioners note that it never seems to sit quite the same way twice.

legendary_air_ngakpa_crown.description: A light ornament of pale metal, worn low on the brow. Air practitioners note that it never seems to sit quite the same way twice.

plain_fire_ngakpa_robe.name: Plain Red Ngakpa Robe
plain_fire_ngakpa_robe.description: Red with orange-bordered trim, the color of the hearth fire that is never fully extinguished. Fire tantra practitioners work with heat as both metaphor and fact. The robe holds warmth longer than the material seems to warrant.

plain_fire_ngakpa_crown.name: Plain Fire Ngakpa Crown
plain_fire_ngakpa_crown.description: Copper ornament with a small flame-shaped finial. Warm to the touch even in cold, which practitioners find appropriate.

blessed_fire_ngakpa_robe.name: Blessed Red Ngakpa Robe
blessed_fire_ngakpa_robe.description: Red with orange-bordered trim, the color of the hearth fire that is never fully extinguished. Fire tantra practitioners work with heat as both metaphor and fact. The robe holds warmth longer than the material seems to warrant.

perfected_fire_ngakpa_crown.description: Copper ornament with a small flame-shaped finial. Warm to the touch even in cold, which practitioners find appropriate.

legendary_fire_ngakpa_crown.description: Copper ornament with a small flame-shaped finial. Warm to the touch even in cold, which practitioners find appropriate.

plain_water_ngakpa_robe.name: Plain Blue Ngakpa Robe
plain_water_ngakpa_robe.description: Blue, the color of deep water. Water practitioners use it for meditations that require stillness and depth. The robe is heavier than it looks, which is also considered appropriate.

plain_water_ngakpa_crown.name: Plain Water Ngakpa Crown
plain_water_ngakpa_crown.description: Silver-set blue stone, worn at the crown. Reflects light in a way that always looks like water.

blessed_water_ngakpa_robe.name: Blessed Blue Ngakpa Robe
blessed_water_ngakpa_robe.description: Blue, the color of deep water. Water practitioners use it for meditations that require stillness and depth. The robe is heavier than it looks, which is also considered appropriate.

legendary_water_ngakpa_crown.description: Silver-set blue stone, worn at the crown. Reflects light in a way that always looks like water.

plain_earth_ngakpa_robe.name: Plain Yellow Ngakpa Robe
plain_earth_ngakpa_robe.description: Yellow, the color of late-season grain and mountain clay. Earth practice is patient, and practitioners who favor earth magic tend to keep their robes in repair longer than most.

plain_earth_ngakpa_crown.name: Plain Earth Ngakpa Crown
plain_earth_ngakpa_crown.description: Gold-set amber, heavy, stable. Earth practitioners tend not to adjust it once it is on.

blessed_earth_ngakpa_robe.name: Blessed Yellow Ngakpa Robe
blessed_earth_ngakpa_robe.description: Yellow, the color of late-season grain and mountain clay. Earth practice is patient, and practitioners who favor earth magic tend to keep their robes in repair longer than most.

plain_healers_robe.name: Plain Healer's Robe
plain_healers_robe.description: White cotton with saffron-dyed borders and a medicine wheel embroidered at the hem. The sleeves roll back easily. Healers wear it not as display but as identification: you can call on this person.

plain_healers_crown.name: Plain Healer's Crown
plain_healers_crown.description: A white cap edged with gold thread and a small blue stone at the brow. Healers are not hard to spot, and this is half the point.

blessed_healers_robe.name: Blessed Healer's Robe
blessed_healers_robe.description: White cotton with saffron-dyed borders and a medicine wheel embroidered at the hem. The sleeves roll back easily. Healers wear it not as display but as identification: you can call on this person.

plain_black_sorcerer_robe.name: Plain Black Sorcerer's Robe
plain_black_sorcerer_robe.description: Black wool heavily embroidered with bone-white thread, charnel ground symbols running hem to collar. Practitioners of the dark schools wear it as armor of a different kind — it communicates what you are before you have to prove it.

plain_black_sorcerer_crown.name: Plain Black Sorcerer's Crown
plain_black_sorcerer_crown.description: A black crown of lacquered bone and iron. The weight is real and the message is clear.

blessed_black_sorcerer_robe.name: Blessed Black Sorcerer's Robe

plain_pandita_cap.name: Plain Pandita Cap
plain_pandita_cap.description: A tall brocade cap worn by scholars and translators, marking long years of study. The pandita tradition values accumulated learning over inspired guessing. So does this cap.

blessed_pandita_cap.name: Blessed Pandita Cap
blessed_pandita_cap.description: A tall brocade cap worn by scholars and translators, marking long years of study. The pandita tradition values accumulated learning over inspired guessing. So does this cap.

plain_longlife_cap.name: Plain Long-life Cap
plain_longlife_cap.description: A round cap embroidered with the eight auspicious symbols, worn during longevity practices. The tradition holds that the body can be persuaded to cooperate if you approach it correctly. This cap is part of the approach.
